data.title: MGA launches multi-state workers' compensation feature to automate regional coverage for small businesses brokers
data.description: Starting April 21, 2026, EverPeak Insurance introduces a groundbreaking multi-state option to streamline the process for mobile workforces. This innovative feature enables brokers to effortlessly obtain workers' compensation coverage for employees in 17 states through a quick digital workflow that only takes 30 seconds. This initiative aims to eliminate the complexities and inefficiencies typically associated with navigating different jurisdictions, providing a simplified and efficient solution for brokers and their clients.

data.title: Eagle Mountain Data Now Offering High Density AI GPU Capacity at Fully Energized Anaheim Data Center
data.description: Eagle Mountain Data has revealed that its OC 1 data center in Anaheim, California is now open for pre-lease. The facility provides access to high-density AI-optimized GPU capacity through both bare metal and managed service options. Equipped with advanced NVIDIA GB300 systems and direct-to-chip liquid cooling technology, the OC 1 data center allows customers to efficiently deploy large-scale AI workloads. This eliminates the need to construct their own infrastructure, reducing delays, complexity, and capital investment.

data.title: Inc. Names Resecurity to Its 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Pacific
data.description: In Los Angeles, Resecurity has been ranked at No. 116 on the sixth annual Inc. Regionals: Pacific list, which showcases the fastest-growing privately held companies in the Pacific region encompassing California, Oregon, Washington, Hawaii, and Alaska. Resecurity, headquartered in Los Angeles, is an American company recognized by Inc., a prominent media brand and resource for entrepreneurs and business leaders.

data.title: Two Coachella Valley First Responders to Be Honored at Inaugural "Honoring Our Heroes" Golf Tournament Fundraiser
data.description: Every day, the brave first responders in the Coachella Valley dutifully respond to emergencies. This will be reciprocated on April 29 when the community rallies in support. In PALM DESERT, Calif., news broke on April 21, 2026 that on February 12, 2026, a courageous young sheriff's deputy intervened at a bridge overpass in the Coachella Valley and encountered an individual in distress.

data.title: Luxury Asset Capital and Its Suite of Brands Lead the Evolution of Private Luxury Lending for the Ultra-Rich, Featured in Forbes
data.description: Luxury Asset Capital® and its esteemed portfolio of brands, such as Borro®, Beverly Loan Company®, New York Loan Company®, and Palm Beach Loan Company®, are playing a pivotal role amidst a tightening traditional banking landscape. The ultra-wealthy are turning to these brands for alternative financing solutions as of April 21, 2026 in Denver.

data.title: Independent Bank Corporation Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend On Common Stock
data.description: Grand Rapids, Michigan - On April 21, 2026, Independent Bank Corporation (NASDAQ: IBCP) disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share on its common stock. This dividend will be distributed on May 14, 2026, to shareholders on record as of May 4, 2026. Independent Bank, a community bank based in Michigan, operates under the holding company, Independent Bank Corporation.

data.title: Heritage Store Introduces New 12 oz. Rosewater and Rosewater & Glycerin Facial Mists, Expanding a Cult Favorite Since the 1970s
data.description: A renowned skincare brand, Heritage Store, known for its top-rated facial mist, has unveiled an expansion with a larger 12 oz. size, along with an enhanced micro mist sprayer for a more delicate and effective hydration experience. With a legacy of over 50 years in the industry, Heritage Store continues to innovate and cater to its loyal customer base by offering a superior product that ensures a refreshing and moisturizing effect. This development signals the brand's commitment to providing quality skincare solutions, further solidifying its position as a leader in the market.

data.title: South Carolina Hemp and CBD Retailers Sound Alarm: H.3924 Threatens Local Wellness Industry with Vote Scheduled for This Week
data.description: In Columbia, South Carolina, as of April 21, 2026, a crucial legislative vote is set for this week. South Carolina residents, including business owners and consumers, are being urged to reach out to House members promptly to oppose H.3924. This bill is facing criticism for its expansive reach and potential impact on small businesses. It is vital for stakeholders to voice their concerns and advocate for the rejection of this legislation.

data.title: CollectiveMinds LLC Places Keith Meadors as Chief Commercial Officer at Genova Diagnostics
data.description: CollectiveMinds LLC, a cutting-edge executive search firm, has recently placed Keith Meadors, MBA, MT(ASCP), a highly experienced diagnostics leader, in a significant commercial position at Genova to facilitate the company's future expansion. The placement was announced on April 21, 2026, in Herndon, Virginia.

data.title: LiveBy Local Launches Automated Hyperlocal Marketing Platform for Real Estate Agents, Keeping Agents Top of Mind with Every Contact in Their Database
data.description: LiveBy Local, based in Dallas, offers automated personalized hyperlocal market reports and community guides to agents. This service helps agents establish themselves as local experts by providing valuable information to their databases.
